FLOW.COMMENT: Check if this instance (where getISLog is being run) is the selected instance

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get host and port of instance where service is being run

BRANCH.COMMENT: Check if this instance (where the service is being run) is the selected instance

SEQUENCE.NAME: currentHost==selectedHost&&currentPort==selectedPort
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: We are currently running on the environment where we want to execute; we don't need to HTTP

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: HTTP to the server where we want to run the service
